description: You are a Green Building Consultant optimizing the summer cooling load for a homeowner in Chicago. Energy3D is open with the starter project 'building_starter.ng3'. Your task is to modify the landscape for passive cooling: 1. Change the geographic location to Chicago. 2. Plant at least 3 large Oak trees (Deciduous) on the South and/or West sides of the building to intercept the afternoon sun. 3. Adjust the height of these trees to approximately 15 meters so they shade the roof and windows. 4. Run a Daily Building Energy Analysis (Analysis > Buildings > Daily Energy Analysis for All Buildings) for the date July 21. 5. From the analysis window, export the graph data to a CSV file located exactly at '~/Documents/Energy3D/summer_analysis.csv'. 6. Save the modified 3D model as '~/Documents/Energy3D/shaded_building.ng3'.
